mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
